identificationModule.briefTitle: Portal Vein Flow Variability to Quantify Right-Sided Hemodynamic Congestion (PORTAL)
identificationModule.officialTitle: Portal Vein Flow Variability to Quantify Right-Sided Hemodynamic Congestion: A Proof-Of-Concept Study

responsibleParty.investigatorFullName: Frederik Hendrik Verbrugge, MD PhD MSc

descriptionModule.briefSummary: This study evaluates the accuracy of a comprehensive venous Doppler echography including the portal vein pulsatility index (PVPI) to quantify invasively measured right-sided venous pressures. A substudy will correlate invasive and non-invasive hemodynamic measurements to ballistocardiography and seismocardiography with the Kino-cardiograph (Kino) device (HeartKinetics, Waterloo, Belgium).

armGroups.label: Patients with advanced heart failure undergoing clinically indicated right heart catheterisation
armGroups.description: Patients with advanced heart failure undergoing right heart catheterisation as clinically indicated, irrespectively of their ejection fraction.
interventionNames: Diagnostic Test: Comprehensive transthoracic echocardiography, Doppler echography & Kino-cardiograph (Kino)

interventions.name: Comprehensive transthoracic echocardiography, Doppler echography & Kino-cardiograph (Kino)
interventions.description: As per inclusion criteria, all patients undergo right heart catheterisation to obtain a full profile of invasive hemodynamic measurements, including pulmonary arterial wedge pressure (PAWP), pulmonary artery pressure, right ventricular pressure, right atrial pressure (RAP), superior and/or inferior vena cava pressure, hepatic vein pressure with/without balloon occlusion. Immediately after the invasive hemodynamic exam, a comprehensive 2D, Color Doppler and Doppler echocardiography exam, including a Doppler study of the Vv. hepaticae, V. portae and V. renalis is performed. Based upon logistic feasibility, ballistocardiography and seismocardiography with the completely non-invasive Kino device (HeartKinetics, Waterloo, Belgium) is performed in a subpopulation of patients envisioned to be at least 50 patients.
armGroupLabels: Patients with advanced heart failure undergoing clinically indicated right heart catheterisation

primaryOutcomes.description: PVPI = (Vmax - Vmin)/Vmax on the portal vein Pulsed wave Doppler signal
primaryOutcomes.timeFrame: Crosssectional study without longitudinal follow-up, measurement is obtained during Doppler echography exam

secondaryOutcomes.measure: Time integral of kinetic energy during the cardiac cycle
secondaryOutcomes.description: Measured by a combination of ballistocardiography and seismocardiography with the Kino device (HeartKinetics, Waterloo, Belgium).
secondaryOutcomes.timeFrame: Crosssectional study without longitudinal follow-up, measurement is obtained during Doppler echography exam

secondaryOutcomes.description: Inferior vena cava diameter \[mm\] upon end-expiration
secondaryOutcomes.timeFrame: Crosssectional study without longitudinal follow-up, measurement is obtained during Doppler echography exam

secondaryOutcomes.measure: Inferior vena cava diameter respiratory variation
secondaryOutcomes.description: Inferior vena cava diameter respiratory variation \[%\]
secondaryOutcomes.timeFrame: Crosssectional study without longitudinal follow-up, measurement is obtained during Doppler echography exam

secondaryOutcomes.measure: Hepatic vein Pulsed wave Doppler signal
secondaryOutcomes.description:
Categorical classification:

* Systolic wave \> Diastolic wave
* Diastolic wave \> Systolic wave
* Systolic flow reversal
secondaryOutcomes.timeFrame: Crosssectional study without longitudinal follow-up, measurement is obtained during Doppler echography exam

secondaryOutcomes.measure: Renal vein Pulsed wave Doppler signal
secondaryOutcomes.description:
Categorical classification:

* Monophasic flow
* Discontinuous biphasic flow
* Discontinuous monophasic flow
secondaryOutcomes.timeFrame: Crosssectional study without longitudinal follow-up, measurement is obtained during Doppler echography exam

secondaryOutcomes.description: Right ventricular (RV) free wall strain assessed in the RV focused view offline with EchoPAC (General Electric Healthcare, Chicago, IL, United States).
secondaryOutcomes.timeFrame: Crosssectional study without longitudinal follow-up, measurement is obtained during Doppler echography exam

secondaryOutcomes.description: Right atrial strain assessed in the RV focused view offline with EchoPAC (General Electric Healthcare, Chicago, IL, United States).
secondaryOutcomes.timeFrame: Crosssectional study without longitudinal follow-up, measurement is obtained during Doppler echography exam

ipdSharingStatementModule.description: Data related will be made available upon reasonable request in adherence with transparency conventions in medical research, always through requests addressed to the primary investigator.
ipdSharingStatementModule.timeFrame: 1 year after completion of the study
